audit_items.proof_trace: RPC/sync data columns from untrusted P2P peers bypass full validation. Gossip path enforces signature verification, proposer checks, and inclusion proofs (L479-508), but RPC custody columns receive only KZG validation (L446), skipping all cryptographic authenticity checks.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker responds to DataColumnsByRange with columns having valid KZG proofs but forged signatures or invalid merkle proofs. Columns pass KZG check (L446), get marked available (L467-475), and could be reconstructed or propagated without detecting the forgery.
